headline: Coca-Cola Confronts ESG Proposals As Investors Weigh Long Term Risks
summary: Coca-Cola faces several activist shareholder proposals on sustainability, plastic packaging, ingredient safety, and diversity at its upcoming annual meeting. The board has recommended voting against these ESG focused proposals, setting up a clear tension with a group of concerned investors. Shareholders are being asked to vote on requests for more detailed reporting and disclosures across environmental and social risk areas. Coca-Cola, NYSE:KO, heads into its annual meeting with ESG issues...
